import time


def wait_for_ready(check_fn, timeout=30):
    start = time.monotonic()
    while time.monotonic() - start < timeout:
        if check_fn():
            return True
        time.sleep(0.01)
    return False


def poll_for_result(get_fn, interval=0.005):
    while True:
        result = get_fn()
        if result is not None:
            return result
        time.sleep(interval)


def wait_until_complete(status_fn):
    while True:
        status = status_fn()
        if status == "done":
            break
        time.sleep(0.02)
